title: Case | Tailored software for Symons
h1: More efficiency, same workflow: how custom software made the difference at Symons

headings.text: More efficiency, same workflow: how custom software made the difference at Symons

paragraphs: “From the very first meeting, their team wasn’t sitting across from us, but beside us. They asked critical questions, always kept the lines of communication open, and addressed every concern right away. That engaged attitude resulted in a solution that fits us perfectly. They’re excellent at building software, but even better at collaboration.”
We developed a modern, scalable application that fits seamlessly with their workflow.
We like a good challenge. Every project comes with its own technical challenges, and that’s exactly how we like it. This time, we successfully delivered:

we are has a lot of experience in building custom software development for small to medium-sized enterprises in various industries. If you are looking for a development partner who thinks along and has a future-proof mindset, we’d be happy to hear from you!
Serious news and insights on technology and innovation. Not-so-serious random facts about we are. All in one monthly email.

firstScreen: SERVICES what we do CASES what we did ABOUT who we are INSIGHTS what we wrote AI AI services contact us SYMONS BV More efficiency, same workflow: how custom software made the difference at Symons web application automatisation +3500 ORDERS EACH YEAR 30min SAVED PER ORDER CPQ SOFTWARE Challenge: outdated software, slow processes Symons, a specialist in custom metal door frames, was working with outdated tools. Price calculations were done manually (CPQ), data wasn’t connected, and document export was inefficient. Every change had to be made in multiple places, which was time-consuming and error-prone. ‍ They were ready to take the next step, without abandoning the way they work. The goal? More efficiency, fewer mistakes. And since Symons handles both small and large-scale custom production, they needed a system flexible enough to grow with them and respond quickly to customer needs. Standard software didn’t cut it. A tailor-made solution was the only way. “From the very first meeting, their team wasn’t sitting across from us, but beside us. They asked critical questions, always kept the lines of communication open, and addressed every concern right away. That engaged attitude resulted in a solution that fits us perfectly. They’re excellent at building software, but even better at collaboration.” Koen Cassenaer Business owner @ Symons Tailored solution We developed a modern, scalable application that fits seamlessly with their workflow. Machine integration: Orders are automatically sent to production, no manual steps needed. Central data management: Updates happen once, and apply everywhere. Smart pricing: Automatic calculations using a custom-built formula tailored to Symons. Auto-generated PDFs: From internal docs to customer-facing files, all done in one click. User-fi
